title: tetraria sylvestris
intro: Tetraria sylvestris, also known as umbrella fern, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Restionaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tetraria sylvestris include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it has also been used to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Tetraria sylvestris can be made by infusing the leaves in water or using them in a decoction, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
